replies.msg:
S: EY HK - Latest health advisory and work arrangement
The leadership is closely monitoring the development of the coronavirus pneumonia, and the health and safety of our people remains our top priority.

Please note that all staff are advised to work from home this week to minimize health risk.

If you are feeling unwell, please seek medical advice immediately and rest at home.

You are also advised to stay and work from home for 14 days AND to notify your team head as well as Talent team if you 1) have travelled to Wuhan and Hubei Province during the Lunar New Year holiday; 2) believe to have been in close contact with any person confirmed or suspected of coronavirus pneumonia.

As always, please be mindful of personal and environmental hygiene. We shall remain agile during this challenging time, as the situation evolves.
今舖全靠ey小霸王

replies.msg:
Dear HR Heads,
We should formalise the reporting system from individual staff, line management, Div / Company Heads / HRHeads and GHR wef tomorrow (29/1/2020) in view of serious outbreak like this Wuhan corona virus. A Group notice may be issued tomorrow as well. We should also demand health reporting by individuals on return to work after travelling to PRC during CNY and thereafter until the current crisis is over. All suspected cases have to be recorded and handled with intensive care. Sanitisation of workplace and common areas where staff will make use of should be frequently reviewed and properly executed.
I will communicate with you further on this.
